<!-- One sentence. What changed and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / tool
- [ ] New agent
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Dependency update

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes with no errors
- [ ] No hardcoded paths, credentials, or account-specific references
- [ ] If adding a new MCP tool: tool is registered in `mcp/registry.ts` and documented in README
- [ ] If changing agent system prompt: changes are grounded in official docs (not SEO blogs)
